'''''Scythis''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was stationed at a customs station when [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] in the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] ''[[Sabra]]'' had to pass through customs to reach [[Outpost 327]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
